params.name: DNA Microarray
params.description:
On Jul 26, 1982 AD, the world's first DNA microarray was successfully created.
The DNA Microarray chip is a type of biotechnology characterized by high-density arrays that can quickly parallel-processes and analyze biomolecules. This technology is based on the principle of molecular hybridization, using microarrays printed with a large number of known sequence gene probes to hybridize with target samples, and processing the hybridization signal intensity and data to obtain different samples o …
